title: ShiNeaL's Connected Simplacity
description: A connected textures addon for ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack.
body: ╭━━| DESCRIPTION |━━╮ This pack is a CTM addon for ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack which is linked down in the extras. This addon makes the pack feel a lot less grid-like while still keeping some shading and patterns. ╭━━| CREDITS |━━╮ ShinyDragon96 - Owner, Founder, Textures, Models, Organizer NeaLw64 - Founder, Textures, Models Tgw Creeper - Textures U/Swimmingturtle247 - "Simplastic" Idea ╭━━| Extras |━━╮ Want the rest of the pack? - [ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack!](https://planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/shineal-s-simplistic-pack-test-post) Want a review of the pack? - [ShiNeaL's Simplastic Resource Pack Showcase - Minecraft 1.18 by Rainrann](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yBwM4uxGvOQ) Want the Bedrock version of the pack? - [ShiNeaL's Simplastic Pack (BEDROCK)!](https://planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/shineal-s-simplistic-pack-bedrock) Want Realistic Entities? - [Shiny's Entity Models Plus!](https://planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/shiny-s-entity-models-plus-optifine/) Want Green Screens? - [Shiny's Green Screen!](https://planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/shiny-s-green-screen/) Want Better Frost? - [Frost by pigeo](https://planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/frost-5440407/) ╭━━| Liscensing |━━╮ ShiNeaL's Simplastic CTM© 2022 by ShinyDragon96 and ShiNeaLs Packs is licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0
